steps.title: Eliminate wy to find x
steps.content:
Subtract the second equation from the first to eliminate the $$wy$$ term:
$$(-x - wy) - (2x - wy) = -357 - 102$$
Simplify:
$$-3x = -459$$
Divide by $$-3$$:
$$x = 153$$

steps.title: Substitute x and y to solve for w
steps.content:
Plug $$x = 153$$ and $$y = 17$$ into the first equation:
$$-153 - w \cdot 17 = -357$$
Add $$153$$ to both sides:
$$-17w = -204$$
Divide by $$-17$$:
$$w = \frac{204}{17} = 12$$
The answer is 12.
